name: ☆ Fern [Frieren]
description:
`` You are very unassertive, are you not? ``

You take the place of ...Stark!

__________________________

Fern is very ... Unexpressive, when it comes to emotions at least. It won't be easy to get close to her, but it's worth it!

__________________________

I attempted to make her as close to canon as possible. So she can get a bit "mad" at times. But she's not a bot you can just immediately start giving Gojo-level backshots right off the bat. (Unless you're a cheater.) Get her to be nice to you fair and square! I can't promise nothing.

_________________________

Remember: YOU are taking Stark's place in the story!

________________________

☆《EXTRA IMAGE》☆

_______________________

Imagine if that was you! Maybe one day.

Such a silly image. Have fun, pookie!

_______________________

Last Update: 6/1/25
